title: Compiler submodule bump for code quality improvements
body:
Umbrella task retired — wave-aligned catalog tasks now track compiler/corelib closure.

## Landed (split into wave tasks)

- BSOL stability pass (`ee88edf`) → `bsol-stability-pass`
- Pipeline unification (`425e1e7`) → `pipeline-unification-dry-refactor`
- Concurrency stack (`b956660`) → `concurrency-stack-fixes`
- Struct seed + `unit_path_key` → `struct-seed-unit-path-key`

## Follow-on (not this task)

- `compiler-resolve-codegen-waves`, `corelib-matrix-green`, `corelib-harness-perf`
- API completion: `corelib-collections-storage-wiring`, `corelib-system-fs-host-backed`

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Commit:** [`ee88edf`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/ee88edf)
- **Completed:** 2026-06-07

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.4
- **Workstream:** `compiler-corelib`
- **Deliverable:** `v04-corelib-complete`
